name: notes_read
description: Read the contents of a note.

path.description: Note path relative to the sandbox root

name: notes_read_lines
description: Read a range of lines from a note.

path.description: Note path relative to the sandbox root

start_line.description: Line number to start reading at (1-indexed, inclusive)

end_line.description: Line number to end reading at (1-indexed, inclusive). When omitted, reads from start_line to the end of the file.

name: notes_list
description: List files and directories at a given path. When an AGENTS.md file exists in the listed directory, its contents are automatically appended to the listing.

path.description: Directory path relative to the sandbox root

long.description: Show detailed format with permissions, size, and dates

name: notes_search
description: Search note contents for a pattern using grep. Returns matching lines with context.

path.description: Note or directory path relative to the sandbox root

recursive.description: Search directories recursively. On by default — set to false only when searching a single note path.

files_with_matches.description: Show only file names that contain matches, not the matching lines

name: notes_write
description: Write content to a note. Creates the note if it does not exist, overwrites if it does. Parent directories are created automatically if they do not exist.

path.description: Note path relative to the sandbox root

content.description: Full note content in markdown format including YAML frontmatter

name: notes_write_lines
description: Replace a range of lines in a note without rewriting the entire note.

path.description: Note path relative to the sandbox root

start_line.description: Line number to start replacing at (1-indexed, inclusive)

end_line.description: Line number to end replacing at (1-indexed, inclusive). Defaults to start_line (single line replacement) if omitted.

original_content.description: The content currently at [start_line, end_line]. The tool verifies this matches the note before applying the patch. If the only difference is trailing whitespace, the note's original trailing whitespace is preserved in the replacement. If it doesn't match, the edit is rejected with the expected vs actual content — re-read the note and retry.

content.description: Replacement content for the specified line range

name: notes_replace
description: Replace all occurrences of a pattern in a note. Supports capture groups ($1-$9) in the replacement string. Returns a diff of changes made. The pattern is matched against the full note content with multiline mode enabled (^ and $ match line boundaries).

path.description: Note path relative to the sandbox root

pattern.description: Search pattern (regex by default, literal when literal: true). Multiline mode: ^ and $ match line boundaries. For multi-line patterns, include actual newlines.

replacement.description: Replacement string. Supports $1-$9 for capture group references (regex mode with capture groups only). Use $$ for a literal $ when the pattern has capture groups. Use an empty string to delete matches. For multi-line replacements, include actual newlines.

max_replacements.description: Maximum number of replacements to apply. 0 (default) means unlimited.

literal.description: Treat the pattern as literal text instead of regex. Default: false.

path.description: Note path relative to the sandbox root

name: notes_delete_dir
description: Delete an empty directory. Refuses to delete non-empty directories.

path.description: Directory path relative to the sandbox root
